title: Philosophy Of Nothing - Simplistic Pack
description: The simplistic resource pack used in the Minecraft Trailers, but for LightningCraft, Tinkers' Construct, Nyx and a few other mods
body:
I created this resource pack for my modpack. It has most textures for most blocks of the following mods:

**- LightningCraft (also all mobs)**

**- Tinkers' Construct**

**- Arcane World**

**- ProjectE**

**- Nyx**

**- Better Questing**

It has also textures for **Eerie Entities**, aside from the Pumpkin Slime, for **Special Mobs**' Cave Spiders and Zombies and for **Energetic Sheep**.

This doesn't contain the base minecraft textures, as I didn't create those.


You can go to this [totally coincidental-looking resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) for the base minecraft textures.
